meaning: n.四轮大马车,长途汽车,教练v.训练,指导
examples: What you need is a drama coach.
He's more than a coach, he's a friend.
Tony Woodcock has joined the team as coach.
"The problem is the coach is obsessed with the physicality of the game now, " he said.
"The swimmers will be looking to start the Olympic cycle again, " explained head coach Dave Champion.
